## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (`ruff check` passes)
- [ ] I have added type hints (`mypy` passes)
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally (`pytest` passes)
- [ ] I have updated the [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation in [docs/](docs/)
